import '../styles/Projects.css'; const IconExternal = () => ( ); const IconGithub = () => ( ); const projects = [ { num: '01', total: '04', icon: '🛒', title: 'E-Commerce Platform', desc: 'A fully responsive e-commerce web application with real-time cart management, user authentication, product filtering, and seamless checkout flow. Built with modern web technologies and a focus on conversion-driven UX.', stack: ['React', 'Node.js', 'Firebase', 'Tailwind'], demo: '#', github: '#', }, { num: '02', total: '04', icon: '📋', title: 'Task Management App', desc: 'A productivity-focused task management application with drag-and-drop boards, team collaboration features, deadline tracking, and progress analytics. Designed for both individual use and team workflows.', stack: ['Vue.js', 'Firebase', 'CSS3', 'Figma'], demo: '#', github: '#', reverse: true, }, { num: '03', total: '04', icon: '🏥', title: 'Clinic Management System', desc: 'A comprehensive web-based clinic management system with patient records, appointment scheduling, billing, and doctor dashboard. Streamlines administrative workflows for small to medium healthcare facilities.', stack: ['PHP', 'MySQL', 'Bootstrap', 'jQuery'], demo: '#', github: '#', }, { num: '04', total: '04', icon: '💬', title: 'Real-Time Chat App', desc: 'A real-time messaging application with private and group chats, media sharing, read receipts, and online presence indicators. Built on Firebase Realtime Database for instant synchronization.', stack: ['React', 'Firebase', 'WebSockets', 'SCSS'], demo: '#', github: '#', reverse: true, }, ]; export default function Projects() { return (
Featured Work

); }
